statement: H100 80GB new secondary-market resale price ranges $25,000-$40,000 (PCIe through SXM5, with SXM at a premium).
why: Secondary-market aggregator lists new-unit H100 80GB resale prices as a static market level, not a change.

impact.mechanism: Secondary resale price level for H100 sets a market reference for merchant GPU valuations.

evidence.source: Compute Exchange — NVIDIA H100 GPU Price in 2026 (secondary market)
evidence.excerpt: New $25,000-$40,000 (PCIe through SXM5; SXM commands the premium)

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: value 21500.0 -> 32500.0 (tol 1%); sources: Compute Exchange — NVIDIA H100 GPU Price in 2026 (secondary market)
